title: pavonia gossweileri
intro: Pavonia gossweileri is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the hollyhock family, which is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pavonia gossweileri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health ailments.
